title: Dominic
html:
Dominic — family-orbit person (likely cousin / extended family) whose mental health and substance struggles Yahir documents across multiple notes from late 2024 into mid-2025. The arc bends down, not up: Oct 2024 = active recovery (meetings); June 2025 = full dissociation.

What we know

  • Earliest mention in vault: 2024 07 mega notebook gift list: "Dominic communist poster and shoes" — buying gifts during the China chapter.
  • The first dedicated note (Oct 31, 2024): on a call with Yahir, Dominic describes a sadistic-doctor torture nightmare. "Living alone, clearly doing hard drugs has fucked him up massively." Doing some right things — attending meetings, seeking help. Yahir regrets not staying in touch.
  • The 2025 collapse (June 21, 2025): Dominic now described as "brain dead potato." Speaks in metaphysical abstract — "this universe's god is a mushroom, I bounce around universes and to jump I had to kill myself." Lies in bed staring at ceiling. "He is numb, stuck in an aggressive loop." Yahir uncertain of outcome — "he may kill himself, he may slowly integrate himself back into society, he may be this abstract brain numb entity in a hospital."
  • Family network surfaces in the June note: Sammy (Dominic's brother), Maile (burnt out, moving out), Tío Edgar (jaded, moving to Mexico).
  • Yahir's role: caretaker-witness — assumes responsibility for Sammy alongside his sister.

Open questions

  • Relationship to Yahir — cousin? Step-sibling? Same family unit as Tío Edgar (uncle)?
  • Outcome past June 2025 — does the arc bend back up, or does it stay flat / decline further?
  • What drugs specifically?
  • Where does Dominic live? Same town as the rest of the family?

Related summaries

  • 2025 06 21 on bubbas dominic
  • 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook — gift list mention
  • 2024 11 15 dominic dreams — likely related (already-existing summary)
